description: Been excellent for us. I recommend it to everyone I talk to when discussing this area in a business.
author: Roger S.
pros: We are a family business that has been operating since 1981. Our business didn't have any forms of data collection for about 25 years. Time cloud has allowed up to report on all the activities that are happening in the business, eg machinery maintenance, goods received, jobs. This has allowed us to create a report on how many hours we are spending on non-billable activities vs how many hours we are adding value. The program gives us a host of options for reporting and it very easy to use.
cons: I would love to see further updates done to the expected costs feature. For example an area where freight costs and material costs could be put in. That way it would lead to a report that could give you all the expected costs of a job + the labour cost and then maybe even add in an invoice amount which in turn leads to a GP amount + GP percentage for each job.

description: Wonderful, all services provided helpful support and ease of use, ease of downloading information into IMS
author: Lynne F.
pros: Ease of use, Timecloud personel pleasant to work with and helpful along every stage, Services what we required
cons: The date settings do not hold and this is time consuming and possibly leads to error in information downloads
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: As you can gather I do not have a high opinion of the program BUT I due to a number of our staff hours not transferring to MYOB I have had contact with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] who has done his darndest to sort this for us. Even he could not figure what the problem was so had to create a whole new report for us to transfer hours from Timecloud to MYOB. I found [SENSITIVE CONTENT] great to converse with - I would give him a 5 Star review for his manner and patience to guide me through to a solution.
author: Helma D.
pros: That you have a good tech to assist with problems.
cons: After using the MYOB software this is no comparison. This is a very slow and if one moves too fast on it there is an extra slow or no movement to the next empoyee. It bombs out sometimes. Perhaps with too many employees or too much outdated information stored it will not transfer info to our MYOB EXO payroll program.

description: Overall, we've had a great experience with Timecloud. I have recommended it to my peers in the industry and would encourage considering software in this space to seriously consider Timecloud. Great work!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It was super easy to implement and has made time tracking a breeze. For a company that manages so many projects, we really needed a comprehensive solution to eliminate the need for multiple other software subscriptions AND save a lot in the process. We couldn't be happier!
cons: It's a smaller company, so the software is not as 'slick' as some other big players out there, but the functionality is incredible, and so well suited to (I'm sure) many other businesses that would usually opt for a bigger provider.

description: My overall experience has been awesome. great customer service, help was always at the end of an email for phone and you never have to wait for hours waiting to be answered.
author: Jody M.
pros: This software is very easy to understand and navigate even for people that's aren't that computer literate.
cons: Haven't came across anything I don't like yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our experience has been great. They have a really supportive team who are always willing to provide support and remedies.
author: Gwyn R.
pros: Simple to use, accurate time tracking and leave applications/monitoring. Managers of each team utilise the system to monitor their teams leave and approve timesheets for payroll processing.
cons: We don't have anything that we can identify. When we had an issue with identifying when leave had been approved, however TimeCloud remedied this with a roster tab.

author: Kovi M.
pros: Amazing personal service in an age of chatbots. Taylor C. completely solved our problem and saved us moving to another provider
cons: Weren't able to solve our iPad issues but appreciate that they found a workaround . Would've been ideal to use our iPad for clocking in and clocking out but it was consistently giving problems

description: Glenn has been my contact throughout our experience with Time cloud and he has listened to my situation, shown a good understanding of the needs of my business and provided excellent solutions to my issues.
author: Philip H.
pros: The user friendliness and versatility of the system, the fact it can be accessed by staff via mobile phone on my shop floor saves time.
cons: Time cloud is of course cloud based which is very convenient but the down side of cloud based systems is the lock in to an external system over the long term and IT systems are constantly changing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Neil M.
pros: - Easy to use, gives us quick reporting options and is great for evacuations.
cons: Would like to tailor the format of the reports Would be good to have a visual output that could show on a who's in screen

author: Emre Ç.
pros: We used it to follow the staff leaves, I think it should be evaluated positively in general.
cons: I didn't have a bad experience I think it's great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Greg M.
pros: Using the Timecloud system got rid of inaccurate paper time sheets.
cons: Sometime have to rescan guys into the system as it stops logging in and out.

author: Lorinda L.
pros: Super easy and efficient to set new employees up and use. When admin is logged in, excellent to keep track of employees clock on and off. Easy and quick to download time sheets to Xero.
cons: The setting up of peoples palms / fingerprints is extremely touchy. Doesn't always pick these up when they clock in and out. Overall, 10/10

description: The overall experience has been fantastic.
author: Trevor G.
pros: We've been using this software for over six months and it has proven to be a valuable part of our business needs now. The tracking of my technician's that work offsite has already saved my company many thousans of dollars.
cons: The internal aspect of integrating your software with our HR system.

description: I am happy with the overall experience.
author: Travis M.
pros: It has helped us streamline of weekly pays towards staff split into cost codes
cons: There has been some bugs with the system at times, but after notifying me contact they have been resolved fairly quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jack C.
pros: The team at timecloud are very helpful with making this product work for us. Any customisations and adjustments needed they are willing and capable to make these happen.
cons: The website can be a little bit slow at times making it a bit frustrating to approve timesheets.

description: 100% reliable and needed for our industry, cant see working without it now.
author: Eric B.
pros: Finger print software is a huge support for an industry that is 24/7 with different types of shift starting times.
cons: Some reports or reporting not well utilised, maybe due to the need of user training to optimise the availability of its capabilities.

author: Hayley R.
pros: We have the finger print scanner, the ease of use is great !
cons: We people dont use it all the time and you have to manually enter hours 1 by 1

author: Janet L.
pros: Advanced but easy to use as very user friendly.
cons: Nothing as we haven't really had problems.

author: Patrick L.
pros: Multiple scan - Palm, finger and password.
cons: There is no reminder next morning when there is no logout at the end of day. If there is a reminder and then able to keep in the time of previous logout.

author: Maureen O.
pros: Facial recognition scanning, as it makes the check in and check out process quick and easy for employees.
cons: Rostering etc - as we do not need to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Timecloud has saved us from wasted hours or processing manual time sheets, it has also tightened up on attendance.
author: Peter R.
pros: Ease of implementation and support to get it up and running
cons: Support was a little slow at the beginning but we worked through it okay

author: Guido P.
pros: easy to use, can use remotely, easy to upload data into MYOB
cons: After 3 months you have to switch to History

author: Megan L.
pros: The ease of use, and accuracy of times. THe reports are easy to read as well, and easy to relay in to my payroll
cons: Not the software - but getting my staff to remember to clock in and out!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Denise M.
pros: Easy to get around, ties in with existing payroll software. Great support and training provided.
cons: Nothing that I have come across as yet, it is still early days and we have not yet fully implemented it but at this stage no issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience is great, good feedback not only from payroll officer but also from our site employees. [sensitive content hidden] from Timecloud has provided excellent customer service through the setup, testing and after-sale process.
author: Darren Q.
pros: Easy to use, layout/user interface is excellent (compared to other Timesheet software), and also customisable to suit Australian payroll environment
cons: As our business is growing we may need more functionality to suit our needs, hope Timecloud to have more functions in the near future.
